Ciudad Juárez

Mission Experience

The people in Ciudad Juárez are known to be resilient, incredibly welcoming, and hardworking. I am honored to be able to serve in this area.

Mission map

What's highlighted is where I'll be serving! Ciudad Juárez is the biggest city of this area, but I could be serving in any of the surrounding cities.
